issues.description: First action should trash THIS CHARACTER (the card being activated), not a card from hand. Should use a different action type or clarify target as 'self'.

PowerBoost with amount 0 is meaningless. The effect grants ability to attack active Characters (not a power boost). Should use GiveKeyword or custom ability mechanism. Duration 'DuringYourTurn' is correct but action type is wrong.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn' — text says 'during this turn' which is current turn only.
Target should filter for {Navy} type Characters, not all Characters. Missing type filter.
Missing condition: 'LeaderHasType' with type '{Navy}' — effect only works if Leader has Navy type.
